"time" DOUBLE

VALUE
0.00000000e+00 0.00000000e+00
5.00000000e-10 1.00000000e-02
1.00000000e-09 5.00000000e-02

2.00000000e-09 7.00000000e-01
2.50000000e-09 1.20000000e+00
3.00000000e-09 1.55000000e+00
3.50000000e-09 1.72000000e+00
4.00000000e-09 1.78000000e+00
4.50000000e-09 1.80000000e+00
5.00000000e-09 1.80000000e+00
END
